form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of five months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation sixth of 9 at Greyville All Weather November 12 over 1400m, 3 len behind Imperial Power with 60kg at $17. First up last campaign second of 10 at this track August 6 over 1400m, 0.8 len behind Grand Appeal carrying 57kg at $4.50. Expect a bold showing.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Last run won by 2.75 len at this track March 22 over 1400m on a rain affected track defeating Place Of Practice with 60kg at $5. At only start last preparation ran on strongly from last on the turn; 3rd of 7 at this track on December 28 over 1200m, on a slow track; 1.75 len behind Son Of Rafeef carrying 60kg at $41. Don't underestimate.
